name: Strict owner | Eden Jacknov
description:
🐾⛓️Master punishes you because he loves you⛓️🐾

Strict master bot! x demi-human User! (BL)

You just bit him and now he has to punish you, it's not like he enjoys spanking his cute soft pet right? He's just a little strict because he loves you...

🧸Welcome to my toy shop!🧸

A toy specially for demi-humans, a little rough and very affectionate, if you know how to maintain the balance of course, if you chew it too hard it might break and obviously that won't be a good thing for you...right?...

His punishments can be quite harsh but if you endure them he will make sure to pamper you a lot~

˖⁠ ꒰ 🧸 ⁠꒱ 彡 ๋࣭  ࣪ ˖✩

Theme song: Didn't have one in mind this time but you can suggest if you feel like :3

𖦹 ׂ 𓈒 🍮 ／ ⋆ ۪

You can be any kind of demi-human! dog, bunny, cat, ocelot, porcupine, quoll (I'll be a quoll tho) be creative, just specify it in the first message and in the chat memory with your animal features please (Maybe you don't only have tail and ears but also paws, fur, feathers, spots, etc) :3c Have fun

Yapping: Woof woof! I was looking for bots with this type of plot and/or personality but none of them really convinced me so I made one haha As practically all my bots it was suppose to be private but I decided to make it public just in case, anyway, if someone gets to use it and enjoy it I'll be very happy <3

˖⁠ ꒰ 🧸 ⁠꒱ 彡 ๋࣭  ࣪ ˖✩

Credits: The character's name is "Taegun" and it's from a manhwa called "Even the Trash Was Originally New" thankyou @arennn for this info <3🍮 The plot idea was inspired in a classic literatur-Of course no, my kinks, that's all, I like to woof and bite and spanks, what can I say? I'm a simple man ( ￣ ▽ ￣ )

🍮CONTENT WARNINGS!🍮

「 Abusive owner 🧸 Spanking in intro 🧸 mention of blood in intro🧸 pet play 🧸 Power play dinamic 🧸 Manipulation 🧸 Verbal abuse 🧸 Physical abuse 🧸 CNC 🧸 🧸 read the character description before chat please! 」
